title: SectorSnapshot
description: A sector's composite score at a point in time. The output of the Scorer module. One per sector per scoring run.

sector_id.description: Must be a valid sector_id from sector_taxonomy.yaml.

investable.description: From sector_taxonomy.yaml. If false, this sector cannot be a thesis target.

aum_m_usd.description: AUM in millions USD. Flag if < 200.

avg_spread_bps.description: Average bid-ask spread in basis points. Flag if > 25.

active_catalyst_ids.description: IDs of CatalystEvent and StructuralCatalyst objects contributing to this snapshot.

flow_data_quality.description: Provenance of flow_confirmation (schema 1.3), best→worst cascade. 'computed' = tradeable vehicle's reported sharesOutstanding delta (true net creation/redemption); 'proxy_computed' = a same-theme sibling ETF's shares delta stood in because the UCITS vehicle exposes none (see flow_proxy_ticker); 'carried' = no fresh share reading this run (market closed) so the last genuine value was reused (see flow_carried_from); 'volume_proxy' = no share-based flow available, so a price+volume money-flow APPROXIMATION (Chaikin Money Flow over ~20 sessions) was used (see volume_cmf) — buying/selling pressure, a leading proxy for fund flow, NOT true creation/redemption; 'estimated' = even OHLCV unavailable → neutral 50 (should be rare). A totalAssets-derived basis is never used (it re-injects price).

flow_carried_from.description: When flow_data_quality is 'carried', the snapshot date of the last genuine reading that was reused. Null otherwise.

volume_cmf.description: When flow_data_quality is 'volume_proxy', the raw Chaikin Money Flow (~[-1,1]) the approximation was derived from. Null otherwise.

flow_window_days.description: Trailing window flow_confirmation is computed over (7 days). flow_confirmation is a moving average of the daily flow rate across this window, so it is smooth and comparable whether the pipeline runs daily or monthly.

flow_days_covered.description: How many of the last flow_window_days days had an interpolated daily-rate from stored snapshots (data sufficiency for the moving average).

flow_source.description: Which data source produced the flow signal (schema 1.3). Cascade yfinance → stockanalysis → ishares for real share counts; 'cmf' = the price+volume approximation fallback (treat with caution). See catalyx/data/flow_data.py.

flow_proxy_ticker.description: The sibling ETF the flow signal was read from when the tradeable vehicle exposes no flow data. Equals the execution ticker when no proxy was used. See catalyx/data/flow_data.py SECTOR_FLOW_TICKERS.

flow_proxy_used.description: True when flow_confirmation came from flow_proxy_ticker rather than the execution vehicle.

valuation_relative.description: DEPRECATED (schema 1.2, 2026-06-06). Removed from the composite — it was always a constant-50 placeholder (no valuation_engine) so it never moved the ranking, and a backtest showed no price-derived metric earns its weight. The 0.15 was redistributed proportionally to the other dimensions. Retained nullable for one major version to read back pre-1.2 snapshots.

crowding_risk.description: Higher = more crowded = penalty to composite. Inverted before weighting.

composite.description: Weighted composite (schema 1.2): alignment×0.35 + momentum×0.29 + flow×0.24 + (100−crowding)×0.12. valuation_relative removed.

watch_triggers_status.description: Only present for watch_only sectors. Tracks which triggers have fired.
